leadText: The Ice Memory (Japanese: アイスメモリ Ice Memory) is a type of held item introduced in Generation VII. It is one of the memories that are associated with Silvally. It corresponds to the Ice type.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] If the holder uses Multi-Attack , it becomes an Ice-type move. RKS System changes a Silvally holding this item to its Ice-type form . Item-manipulating effects (such as Trick and Fling ) cannot give Silvally a memory or remove a memory from Silvally. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] RKS System changes a Silvally holding this item to its Ice-type form .

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] If the holder uses Multi-Attack , it becomes an Ice-type move. RKS System changes a Silvally holding this item to its Ice-type form . Item-manipulating effects (such as Trick and Fling ) cannot give Silvally a memory or remove a memory from Silvally.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods S M Aether Paradise (from Gladion after becoming Champion ) US UM Ancient Poni Path (from Wicke after becoming Champion ) Sw Sh Battle Tower (from a League Staff member)

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A memory disc that contains Ice-type data. It changes the type of the holder if held by a certain species of Pokémon.
